description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, matte orange fabric. The sofa features high, thickly padded armrests and backrest, which are horizontally segmented with subtle stitching, giving it a structured and contemporary appearance. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, each accompanied by a matching rectangular lumbar pillow and a larger back cushion, all in the same orange hue. The armrests and backrest are of equal height, creating a semi-enclosed, boxy silhouette that offers a sense of privacy and comfort. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform color, making it suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy orange two-seater sofa with high, padded armrests and backrest, featuring smooth upholstery and matching cushions. The design is minimalist and structured, with a uniform color and subtle horizontal stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, two back cushions, and two lumbar pillows, all in orange, with high armrests and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the horizontal segmented stitching along the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest with horizontal stitched segments and a solid, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and side panel design, showing the sofa's depth and padding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions, two large back cushions, and two smaller lumbar pillows; all cushions are loose and uniform in size, arranged symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: High, straight, and thickly padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, structured profile and horizontal stitched segments.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base, likely providing a low-profile appearance with no exposed supports.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with thick padding and horizontal segmented stitching, matching the armrest height and forming a semi-enclosed structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid orange color with a smooth, matte finish and subtle horizontal stitched segments on the exterior surfaces; no visible decorative patterns or tufting.
